content: The Reserve Bank of India announced that it has kept the repo rate unchanged after the latest monetary policy meeting. Officials stated that inflation remains under observation while economic growth continues to be monitored. The central bank said future policy decisions will depend on incoming economic data.

The Indian Space Research Organisation successfully completed another launch mission carrying multiple satellites into orbit. Scientists confirmed that all mission objectives were achieved and communication with the satellites was established shortly after launch.

A viral online post claims that NASA has officially confirmed drinking soft drinks can completely cure cancer within two days. The claim states hospitals will stop using conventional medicine because the discovery has already been approved worldwide.

Several social media posts claim that the Government of India has announced the cancellation of all bank loans starting next week. No official notification or statement from the Reserve Bank of India supports this claim.
